defs: Something given or admitted; a fact or principle granted; that upon which an inference or an argument is based; -- used chiefly in the plural.
quotes: Any writer, therefore, who . . . furnishes us with data sufficient to determine the time in which he wrote.

defs: a single piece of information; a fact; especially a piece of information obtained by observation or experiment; -- used mostly in the plural.
The quantities or relations which are assumed to be given in any problem.
a point, line, or level surface used as a reference in measuring elevations.
